===================
Single French Quote
===================

theorem ex3 (p q : Prop) : p → q → p ∧ q :=
  fun _ _ => ⟨p, q⟩

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (binders
      (explicit_binder
        (identifier)
        (identifier)
        (identifier)))
    (arrow
      (identifier)
      (arrow
        (identifier)
        (binary_expression
          (identifier)
          (identifier))))
    (fun
      (hole)
      (hole)
      (anonymous_constructor
        (identifier)
        (identifier)))))
